name: electron-audio-capture
description: Prototype: desktop + mic audio capture via Chromium CoreAudio Tap

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: AudioCapture needs microphone access to record your voice during meetings.
extendInfo.NSScreenCaptureUsageDescription: AudioCapture needs screen recording permission to capture system audio from your desktop.
extendInfo.NSAudioCaptureUsageDescription: AudioCapture uses Apple's CoreAudio Tap API to capture system audio. This permission is required on macOS 14.2 and later.
